name: Marcello Hernández
blurb: He joined SNL in 2022 and released his debut Netflix special, American Boy, in 2026.
bio: Marcello Hernandez is an American stand-up comedian and actor from Miami, of Cuban and Dominican descent, known as a cast member on Saturday Night Live and for material centered on his Latino family and dating life. He joined SNL in 2022 and released his debut Netflix special, American Boy, in 2026.

timeline.ev: Moves to New York City to pursue comedy full-time
Joins the cast of Saturday Night Live
Makes his Tonight Show stand-up debut
Releases debut Netflix special, American Boy

bits.t: Marcello Hernandez Makes His Tonight Show Stand-Up Debut
